backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Journey, LocationInfo, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, etc.) and stable state maps for a travel/map explorer app with blob storage and access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing four UI repositioning/restoration tasks for LocationMapExplorer.tsx: moving Time Zone and Global Control popups to the left side, restoring local time display, and re-adding a Font Size slider.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes, serving as a reference for build planning and component documentation.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, loading the SunCalc CDN script and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and QueryClientProvider, rendering LocationMapExplorer alongside BackendDebugger and a toast notifier.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component providing tabbed management of journeys, per-journey schedules (keyed by journey title), travel spots, music albums, and timezone/geoname data with CRUD dialogs and collapsible sections.
Invisible utility component that exposes the backend actor as window.backend and logs debugging instructions (role checks, admin promotion) to the browser console on mount.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: A React component for managing city photo/video albums, supporting file uploads, media removal, and social media link management with authentication via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: A React component for managing a geographical city database, supporting paginated browsing, search, CSV import from Geonames format, and CRUD operations on city records.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: A React component that renders an interactive 10-heart rating widget supporting partial fills, hover effects, and click-based fractional ratings up to 10.0.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A large React component rendering a 3D interactive globe using Three.js with features like country borders, city markers, timezone overlays, solar terminator, and flight path animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: Renders a scrapbook/doodle-styled itinerary dialog for a given journey, displaying schedule items grouped by day with Comic Sans styling, amber color palette, and scroll area.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: Renders a retro vintage postcard-styled itinerary dialog for a given journey, displaying schedule items grouped by day with serif fonts, postmark effects, and an amber/red color palette.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A dialog component for adding, editing, or deleting a photo associated with a map location, handling file upload to blob storage and backend persistence.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: A dialog-based authentication panel that handles Internet Identity login and logout, displaying the user's principal ID and current auth status.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that renders travel spots, schedule items, and bookmarks as markers with popups, supporting zoom controls, city filtering, and a dialog for adding new bookmarks.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube, Instagram) for a travel spot, with carousel navigation for images.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin UI component for managing music albums and songs, supporting create/edit/delete operations for albums and file-upload-based song addition via dialogs and forms.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music browser panel that lists all music albums and their songs, allowing the user to select a song for playback via a callback prop.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent audio player bar component that plays songs from the user's music albums, supporting play/pause, skip, volume control, and progress tracking via an HTML Audio element.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: A React component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data, supporting file upload to a backend canister and IndexedDB caching, with a manual multi-step execution flow for persisting and verifying the data.
A panel component that displays all journeys categorized as live, upcoming, or past, with expandable schedule previews and options to view itineraries in doodle or retro styles and trigger flight animations on a map.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: A CRUD management component for travel spots, allowing users to add, edit, delete, and search spots by city, with support for media file uploads and social media link attachments.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: A panel component that aggregates and displays travel spots and bookmarks grouped by city and type, with collapsible sections and type-specific icons and color coding.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: A settings dialog component for managing website layout preferences such as toggling the music player bar, setting a default search place, and displaying the current local time with UTC offset.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file exposing data-fetching and mutation hooks for all backend entities (journeys, locations, music, schedules, etc.), plus utilities for geocoding, country normalization, and social media URL validation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that configures Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, sidebar, music player), and includes utility style rules for headings and layout.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides a function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year, plus test cases validating results at equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a utility function that returns all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (with quarter-hour precision) by querying the Intl API against GeoJSON timezone data.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Loads and caches timezone GeoJSON boundary data using IndexedDB and a backend fetch, and exposes utilities for timezone boundary detection and local time calculations.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Renders timezone boundaries on a 3D globe using Three.js, with support for quarter-hour UTC offset precision, antimeridian unwrapping, and optional translucent fill meshes for hovered timezones.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map/globe explorer page featuring location search, timezone overlay controls, world clock, and panels for travel, music, admin, and website layout.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and helper functions for styling schedule items by day index, including day label generation, day index computation, and human-readable date formatting.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups and sorts schedule items by calendar day and time to build per-day route coordinate arrays for map rendering.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Country Map Explorer' tracking schema version, four existing UI repositioning/restoration features, and build configuration flags.
